poise_forest.title: Find the Poise Forest biome in the End outer islands (Endergetic Expansion)

poise_wood.title: Collect Poise Wood from the Poise Forest

subtitle.text: The End has its own ecology. It predates you. It will outlast you.

description: Endergetic Expansion adds the Poise Forest — a glowing biome in the End's outer islands.
Poise Trees are luminescent and grow in clusters.
The biome has its own wood type, flora, and fauna.
The Poise Forest represents the End's native life:
not hostile, not designed to be consumed — just present.
The Ender Dragon does not rule the Poise Forest.
They can be grown in the Overworld under certain conditions.
The kingdom you built in Ch12 can have a piece of the End in it.
→ Find the Poise Forest in the outer End [check]
